sb_prompt: DISCUSS HOW YOU AND THE OTHER CALLER KEEP UP ON CURRENT EVENTS.      DO YOU GET MOST OF YOUR NEWS FROM TVOR PEOPLE YOU KNOW?  ARE YOU SATISFIED WITH THE QUALITY OF COVERAGE?
turns: Hi there! So, how do we keep up on current events? I usually get most of my news from online sources and social media platforms. It's easier for me to access information that way, especially since I'm always on my phone or computer anyway. What about you? How do you stay informed?

Part A: Yeah, I definitely agree with you on that. Online sources are great because they provide instant updates and breaking news. But sometimes, I also rely on people around me who happen to be knowledgeable about certain topics or current affairs. My friends come from diverse backgrounds and have different perspectives, which helps me gain multiple viewpoints on various issues. And of course, I occasionally watch news programs on television as well, just to hear experts analyze things from their own angles.

While I appreciate your approach of getting news from diverse sources, I must admit that I don't really watch TV anymore. Instead, I prefer listening to podcasts while commuting or during my leisure time. That way, I can consume quality content without being bombarded by commercials or sensational headlines.
